title: Uwu
description: One last dance. The power of a god used to destroy an angel.
body:
# Created for Memory Lapse!
Uwu is a mod adding two new items, the Sundown Silence and the Harmonizer.

The Sundown Silence will, upon placement, create a large 58x58 border, and will tick down over ten minutes. Upon completion, any entity inside the radius without a Harmonizer in their inventory will be killed.

Created for a lore event for a story-based Minecraft SMP, do not expect anything special to happen.

# Important!
This mod **WILL NOT BE UPDATED EVER.** It was made for one purpose and one purpose only, and not primarily for public release. Do not harass me over this.
